title: [codereview-pass3-robustness] coap_dtn.c: init does not lock mutex during lichen_dtn_init_with_size; potential race on first CoAP request before init completes. Also missing K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_senml_pack_mutex) or combined. Tagged codereview
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:67. Follows pattern from loadng.c and native.c for static shared state. Fix all before closing main bead. Pass 3 after first logical chunk (mutex+init fix).
close_reason: Fixed in coap_dtn.c with K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_senml_pack_mutex) and usage of statics + locks. 3 clean passes.
